scripts.kill:desktop: taskkill /F /IM "India Itinerary Planner.exe" >nul 2>&1 || echo Desktop app not running
scripts.kill:electron: taskkill /F /IM electron.exe >nul 2>&1 || echo Electron not running
scripts.clean:desktop: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path dist) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist }; if (Test-Path release) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force release }"
scripts.kill-java: taskkill /F /IM java.exe >nul 2>&1 || echo Java not running
scripts.copy:jar: if not exist electron\resources\backend mkdir electron\resources\backend && copy ..\backend\target\itinerary-backend-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar electron\resources\backend\app.jar
scripts.dist: npm run kill:desktop && npm run kill:electron && npm run clean:desktop && npm run kill-java && npm run build && npm run backend:jar && npm run copy:jar && electron-builder
